---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A short, clear description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem it solves

Describe the problem or limitation this feature would address.
> e.g. "There is no way to export the analysis history, so I have to copy results one by one."

## Proposed solution

Describe how you imagine the feature working. Be as specific as you can.

## Alternatives considered

Have you considered any other approaches or workarounds? Why are they not sufficient?

## Additional context

Any mockups, examples, or references that help illustrate the request.
